resultList.dtldesc: Discover a spacious and well-designed 3 BHK residential house for sale in Vatva, Ahmedabad. Offering modern comforts and a prime location, this home is perfect for a convenient and peaceful lifestyle. This beautifully designed 3 BHK residential house in Vatva, offers a perfect combination of comfort, space, and modern amenities. Spanning three floors with an open terrace, this south-east-facing home is ideal for families seeking a well-connected and peaceful lifestyle.The ground floor features a spacious hall with a stylish POP ceiling, a modular kitchen with a granite platform and sink, a dedicated washing area, and a common bathroom. The first floor comprises two well-appointed bedrooms, each with an attached bathroom, along with attached cupboards for storage. The second floor houses an additional bedroom with an attached bathroom and an open gallery that offers serene views inside the society.The interiors are semi-furnished with thoughtful inclusions like a large C-shaped sofa set, a TV showcase in the living room, and built-in cupboards in the kitchen and bedrooms. The flooring is elegantly tiled and consistent across all floors, enhancing the aesthetic appeal of the home. Two attached balconiesone connected to the master bedroom and the other to the semi-master bedroomoffer a delightful roadside view.The home is equipped with four bathrooms, including one Indian-style and three Western-style, all fitted with geysers and shower cubicles for added convenience. Internal stairs provide seamless connectivity across floors, and an Adani gas line ensures an uninterrupted supply. Residents can enjoy premium amenities, including access to a swimming pool and gym within the society. Parking is well taken care of with one covered and one open parking space. The property is secured with CCTV surveillance and dedicated security personnel.Strategically located near essential landmarks, the house offers proximity to Kutir Vidyalaya, Vatva Gaam, Osia Mall, and Swastik Hospital. Rabari Colony Metro Station ensures seamless connectivity, while a bus stop just 400 meters away provides easy access to public transport. This well-designed home, complemented by modern features and excellent connectivity, is a perfect investment for a comfortable and convenient lifestyle.
